title: selaginella eclipes
intro: Selaginella eclipes, also known as the Eclipse Spikemoss, is a type of plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella, a group of small, non-vascular plants commonly referred to as spikemosses. The Eclipse Spikemoss has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
